title: 「Even 句」句型
titleEn: Using Even to express “even” or “even ... too”

omissions: The PDF supplies the descriptive lesson title in Chinese only; titleEn is an editorial translation.
English translations for the Important Rules are editorial because those explanations are supplied in Chinese in the PDF.

formula: Subject + verb / be + X + and even + a stronger or more surprising Y

formulas.labelZh: 較強或較令人意外的重點
formulas.formula: Subject + verb / be + X + and even + a stronger or more surprising Y
Subject + even + main verb + other information

formulas.labelEn: After an auxiliary, modal or be
formulas.labelZh: 放在助動詞、情態動詞或 be 之後
formulas.formula: Subject + auxiliary / modal / be + even + focused information
Even + focused subject + verb + other information
Subject + auxiliary / modal / be + not + even + focused information

example: Having five children was normal and even necessary in the past.
exampleZh: 在過去，生五個孩子是正常的，甚至是必要的。

examples.en: Having five children was normal and even necessary in the past.
examples.zh: 在過去，生五個孩子是正常的，甚至是必要的。

meaning.en: Use even to highlight a person, thing, action, quality or result that is more surprising, less expected or goes further than the other information.
meaning.zh: 使用 even 強調較令人意外、較出乎預期，或比前一點更進一步的人、事、動作、特質或結果。

benefits.en: It shows exactly what is surprising. Even draws the reader’s attention to the least expected part of the sentence.
benefits.zh: 它能清楚指出哪一點最令人意外。even 會把讀者的注意力帶到句子中最出乎意料的部分。

benefits.en: It helps you build a stronger message. You can begin with an ordinary point and then add a stronger or more impressive point.
benefits.zh: 它能幫助你逐步加強意思。你可以先提出一般情況，再加入一個更強烈或更令人印象深刻的重點。

benefits.en: It joins related ideas more smoothly. Instead of repeatedly writing “more surprisingly” or using two separate sentences, you can connect the ideas with and even.
benefits.zh: 它能更流暢地連接相關意思。你不需要反覆使用「更令人意外的是」，也不需要把內容拆成兩句；使用 and even 便可把意思自然地連起來。

benefits.en: It makes examples and lists more powerful. Placing even before the most unexpected example makes the final item stand out.
benefits.zh: 它能令例子和列舉更有重點。把 even 放在最令人意外的例子前，可以令最後一項更加突出。

benefits.en: It expresses a surprising negative clearly. Not even shows that someone failed to do the easiest, smallest or most basic thing.
benefits.zh: 它能清楚表達令人意外的否定情況。not even 可以表示某人連最容易、最少或最基本的事情也沒有做到。

rules.en: Place even before the word, phrase or meaning you want to emphasise.
rules.zh: even 要放在你想強調的字、詞組或意思之前。
examples: Even the youngest student understood the instructions.

rules.en: Use and even when the second point goes further or is more surprising than the first.
rules.zh: 當第二點比第一點更進一步或更令人意外時，可以使用 and even。
examples: The village has a clinic and even a small library.

rules.en: Even normally appears before a main verb, but after be, a modal verb or an auxiliary verb.
rules.zh: even 通常放在主要動詞之前，但放在 be、情態動詞或助動詞之後。
examples: They have even finished the work.

rules.en: Not even means that someone did not do the easiest, smallest or most basic thing.
rules.zh: not even 表示「連最低限度或最基本的事情也沒有做到」。
examples: Leo did not even read the first page.

rules.en: Even does not simply mean very: very increases degree, whereas even marks a point as more surprising.
rules.zh: even 並不只是表示 very；very 主要加強程度，even 則帶出「這一點更令人意外」的意思。

rules.en: This lesson does not cover even though or even if; even though means “although”, while even if means “regardless of whether”.
rules.zh: 本課不包括 even though 和 even if；even though 表示「雖然」，even if 表示「即使」，兩者屬於不同句型。

sourceOmissions: The PDF supplies the descriptive lesson title in Chinese only; titleEn is an editorial translation.
English translations for the Important Rules are editorial because those explanations are supplied in Chinese in the PDF.

en: Rewrite each sentence using even to show that one point is more surprising, stronger or less expected.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 even 改寫以下句子，以表示某一點更令人意外、更進一步或更出乎預期。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: This exercise was long. More surprisingly, it was also tiring.
questions.promptZh: 這項練習很長。更令人意外的是，它也令人疲倦。
questions.answer: This exercise was long and even tiring.
questions.answerZh: 這項練習很長，甚至令人疲倦。
questions.highlight: This exercise was long and even tiring.

questions.prompt: The weather became cold and, more seriously, dangerous for hikers.
questions.promptZh: 天氣變得寒冷，更嚴重的是，對遠足人士構成危險。
questions.answer: The weather became cold and even dangerous for hikers.
questions.answerZh: 天氣變得寒冷，甚至對遠足人士構成危險。
questions.highlight: The weather became cold and even dangerous for hikers.

questions.prompt: Our guide was friendly. To our surprise, she stayed to help us after the tour.
questions.promptZh: 我們的導遊很友善。令我們意外的是，行程結束後她留下來幫助我們。
questions.answer: Our guide was friendly and even stayed to help us after the tour.
questions.answerZh: 我們的導遊很友善，甚至在行程結束後留下來幫助我們。
questions.highlight: Our guide was friendly and even stayed to help us after the tour.

questions.prompt: This village has a clinic. Unexpectedly, it also has a small library.
questions.promptZh: 這條村有一間診所。出乎意料的是，村內還有一間小型圖書館。
questions.answer: This village has a clinic and even a small library.
questions.answerZh: 這條村有一間診所，甚至還有一間小型圖書館。
questions.highlight: This village has a clinic and even a small library.

questions.prompt: Mia cleaned the kitchen. She went further by washing the windows too.
questions.promptZh: 米婭清潔了廚房。她更進一步把窗戶也洗乾淨。
questions.answer: Mia cleaned the kitchen and even washed the windows.
questions.answerZh: 米婭清潔了廚房，甚至把窗戶也洗乾淨。
questions.highlight: Mia cleaned the kitchen and even washed the windows.

questions.prompt: Your ticket includes lunch. It also includes a free drink, which is unusual.
questions.promptZh: 你的門票包括午餐，而且還包括一杯免費飲品，這並不常見。
questions.answer: Your ticket includes lunch and even a free drink.
questions.answerZh: 你的門票包括午餐，甚至還包括一杯免費飲品。
questions.highlight: Your ticket includes lunch and even a free drink.

questions.prompt: Ben can read French. More impressively, he can write it too.
questions.promptZh: 本能閱讀法文。更令人佩服的是，他也能用法文寫作。
questions.answer: Ben can read French and even write it.
questions.answerZh: 本能閱讀法文，甚至能用法文寫作。
questions.highlight: Ben can read French and even write it.

questions.prompt: This app is simple to use. Surprisingly, it is also fun.
questions.promptZh: 這個應用程式很容易使用。令人意外的是，它也很有趣。
questions.answer: This app is simple to use and even fun.
questions.answerZh: 這個應用程式很容易使用，甚至很有趣。
questions.highlight: This app is simple to use and even fun.

questions.prompt: The shop opens on Sundays. Less commonly, it also opens on public holidays.
questions.promptZh: 這間商店星期日營業。更少見的是，它在公眾假期也會營業。
questions.answer: The shop opens on Sundays and even on public holidays.
questions.answerZh: 這間商店星期日營業，甚至在公眾假期也會營業。
questions.highlight: The shop opens on Sundays and even on public holidays.

questions.prompt: The child remembered the poem. More impressively, she recited it without help.
questions.promptZh: 這個孩子記得整首詩。更令人佩服的是，她在沒有協助下把它朗誦出來。
questions.answer: The child remembered the poem and even recited it without help.
questions.answerZh: 這個孩子記得整首詩，甚至在沒有協助下把它朗誦出來。
questions.highlight: The child remembered the poem and even recited it without help.

questions.prompt: It was surprising that Ella remembered my birthday.
questions.promptZh: 令人意外的是，艾拉記得我的生日。
questions.answer: Ella even remembered my birthday.
questions.answerZh: 艾拉甚至記得我的生日。
questions.highlight: Ella even remembered my birthday.

questions.prompt: People are surprised that this baby can recognise his own name.
questions.promptZh: 人們很驚訝這個嬰兒能認出自己的名字。
questions.answer: This baby can even recognise his own name.
questions.answerZh: 這個嬰兒甚至能認出自己的名字。
questions.highlight: This baby can even recognise his own name.

questions.prompt: No one expected our teacher to bring snacks for the class, but she did.
questions.promptZh: 沒有人預期老師會帶小食給全班，但她真的帶了。
questions.answer: Our teacher even brought snacks for the class.
questions.answerZh: 我們的老師甚至帶了小食給全班。
questions.highlight: Our teacher even brought snacks for the class.

questions.prompt: Although the computer is old, it can run the new programme, which is surprising.
questions.promptZh: 雖然這部電腦很舊，但它能運行新程式，實在令人意外。
questions.answer: The old computer can even run the new programme.
questions.answerZh: 這部舊電腦甚至能運行新程式。
questions.highlight: The old computer can even run the new programme.

questions.prompt: It was unexpected that Sam apologised to the person he had argued with.
questions.promptZh: 山姆竟然向曾與他爭吵的人道歉，這是出乎意料的。
questions.answer: Sam even apologised to the person he had argued with.
questions.answerZh: 山姆甚至向曾與他爭吵的人道歉。
questions.highlight: Sam even apologised to the person he had argued with.

questions.prompt: The youngest student was the person we least expected to understand the instructions, but she did.
questions.promptZh: 我們最沒想到最年幼的學生會明白指示，但她真的明白了。
questions.answer: Even the youngest student understood the instructions.
questions.answerZh: 甚至最年幼的學生也明白了指示。
questions.highlight: Even the youngest student understood the instructions.

questions.prompt: My grandfather is the person we least expected to use the payment app, but he uses it now.
questions.promptZh: 我們最沒想到祖父會使用付款應用程式，但他現在真的會使用。
questions.answer: My grandfather even uses the payment app now.
questions.answerZh: 我的祖父現在甚至會使用付款應用程式。
questions.highlight: My grandfather even uses the payment app now.

questions.prompt: Most small shops in the area do not accept credit cards, but this small shop does.
questions.promptZh: 區內大部分小商店都不接受信用卡，但這間小商店接受。
questions.answer: This small shop even accepts credit cards.
questions.answerZh: 這間小商店甚至接受信用卡。
questions.highlight: This small shop even accepts credit cards.

questions.prompt: Although she was the shyest student, she asked a question, which surprised everyone.
questions.promptZh: 雖然她是最害羞的學生，但她提出了一個問題，令所有人感到意外。
questions.answer: Even the shyest student asked a question.
questions.answerZh: 甚至最害羞的學生也提出了一個問題。
questions.highlight: Even the shyest student asked a question.

questions.prompt: No one expected the bus driver to know about the road closure, but he did.
questions.promptZh: 沒有人預期巴士司機會知道封路消息，但他真的知道。
questions.answer: Even the bus driver knew about the road closure.
questions.answerZh: 甚至巴士司機也知道封路消息。
questions.highlight: Even the bus driver knew about the road closure.

questions.prompt: The first test was hard, but the second test was harder.
questions.promptZh: 第一次測驗很難，但第二次測驗更難。
questions.answer: The second test was even harder than the first.
questions.answerZh: 第二次測驗甚至比第一次更難。
questions.highlight: The second test was even harder than the first.

questions.prompt: The old route was already short, but this new route is shorter.
questions.promptZh: 舊路線已經很短，但這條新路線更短。
questions.answer: This new route is even shorter than the old one.
questions.answerZh: 這條新路線甚至比舊路線更短。
questions.highlight: This new route is even shorter than the old one.

questions.prompt: The black coat is cheap, but the blue coat is cheaper.
questions.promptZh: 黑色外套很便宜，但藍色外套更便宜。
questions.answer: The blue coat is even cheaper than the black one.
questions.answerZh: 藍色外套甚至比黑色外套更便宜。
questions.highlight: The blue coat is even cheaper than the black one.

questions.prompt: The earlier chapters were exciting, but the final chapter was more exciting.
questions.promptZh: 前面的章節很精彩，但最後一章更加精彩。
questions.answer: The final chapter was even more exciting than the earlier chapters.
questions.answerZh: 最後一章甚至比前面的章節更加精彩。
questions.highlight: The final chapter was even more exciting than the earlier chapters.

questions.prompt: Our hospital is open at night. It also remains open on public holidays, which is less common.
questions.promptZh: 我們的醫院晚上開放，而且在公眾假期仍然開放，這較為少見。
questions.answer: Our hospital is open at night and even on public holidays.
questions.answerZh: 我們的醫院晚上開放，甚至在公眾假期也照常開放。
questions.highlight: Our hospital is open at night and even on public holidays.

questions.prompt: The library lends books and magazines. Surprisingly, it also lends board games.
questions.promptZh: 圖書館借出書籍和雜誌。令人意外的是，它也借出桌上遊戲。
questions.answer: The library lends books, magazines and even board games.
questions.answerZh: 圖書館借出書籍、雜誌，甚至桌上遊戲。
questions.highlight: The library lends books, magazines and even board games.

questions.prompt: Our class collected clothes and food for the families. To everyone’s surprise, we also collected laptops.
questions.promptZh: 我們的班別為這些家庭收集衣物和食物。令所有人意外的是，我們還收集了手提電腦。
questions.answer: Our class collected clothes, food and even laptops for the families.
questions.answerZh: 我們的班別為這些家庭收集衣物、食物，甚至手提電腦。
questions.highlight: Our class collected clothes, food and even laptops for the families.

questions.prompt: The storm damaged trees and cars. More seriously, it damaged several houses.
questions.promptZh: 暴風雨損毀了樹木和汽車。更嚴重的是，它還損毀了數間房屋。
questions.answer: The storm damaged trees, cars and even several houses.
questions.answerZh: 暴風雨損毀了樹木、汽車，甚至數間房屋。
questions.highlight: The storm damaged trees, cars and even several houses.

questions.prompt: This café serves breakfast until noon. At weekends, it serves breakfast later than that.
questions.promptZh: 這間咖啡店供應早餐至中午，而在週末，早餐供應時間更長。
questions.answer: This café serves breakfast until noon and even later at weekends.
questions.answerZh: 這間咖啡店供應早餐至中午，週末甚至供應得更晚。
questions.highlight: This café serves breakfast until noon and even later at weekends.

questions.prompt: The runner trained in the rain. Surprisingly, she also trained in the snow.
questions.promptZh: 這名跑手在雨中訓練。令人意外的是，她也在雪中訓練。
questions.answer: The runner trained in the rain and even in the snow.
questions.answerZh: 這名跑手在雨中訓練，甚至也在雪中訓練。
questions.highlight: The runner trained in the rain and even in the snow.

questions.prompt: It was surprising that Leo did not read the first page.
questions.promptZh: 令人意外的是，里奧連第一頁也沒有讀。
questions.answer: Leo did not even read the first page.
questions.answerZh: 里奧連第一頁也沒有讀。
questions.highlight: Leo did not even read the first page.

questions.prompt: It was surprising that this machine could not print a simple document.
questions.promptZh: 令人意外的是，這部機器連一份簡單文件也無法列印。
questions.answer: This machine cannot even print a simple document.
questions.answerZh: 這部機器連一份簡單文件也無法列印。
questions.highlight: This machine cannot even print a simple document.

questions.prompt: Nina left without saying goodbye, which surprised everyone.
questions.promptZh: 妮娜沒有道別便離開了，令所有人感到意外。
questions.answer: Nina did not even say goodbye before leaving.
questions.answerZh: 妮娜離開前連再見也沒有說。
questions.highlight: Nina did not even say goodbye before leaving.

questions.prompt: It was surprising that the hotel failed to provide clean towels.
questions.promptZh: 令人意外的是，酒店沒有提供乾淨毛巾。
questions.answer: The hotel did not even provide clean towels.
questions.answerZh: 這間酒店連乾淨毛巾也沒有提供。
questions.highlight: The hotel did not even provide clean towels.

questions.prompt: Surprisingly, the lowest shelf was out of this child’s reach.
questions.promptZh: 令人意外的是，這個孩子連最低一層架也碰不到。
questions.answer: This child could not even reach the lowest shelf.
questions.answerZh: 這個孩子連最低一層架也碰不到。
questions.highlight: This child could not even reach the lowest shelf.

questions.prompt: Our team played the whole match without scoring once.
questions.promptZh: 我們的球隊踢完整場比賽，一球也沒有取得。
questions.answer: Our team did not even score once.
questions.answerZh: 我們的球隊連一球也沒有取得。
questions.highlight: Our team did not even score once.

questions.prompt: The customer received no apology after complaining, which was surprising.
questions.promptZh: 顧客投訴後沒有收到任何道歉，這令人意外。
questions.answer: The customer did not even receive an apology.
questions.answerZh: 顧客連一句道歉也沒有收到。
questions.highlight: The customer did not even receive an apology.

questions.prompt: It was surprising that no one noticed that the sign had changed.
questions.promptZh: 令人意外的是，沒有人留意到告示已經更改。
questions.answer: No one even noticed that the sign had changed.
questions.answerZh: 竟然沒有人留意到告示已經更改。
questions.highlight: No one even noticed that the sign had changed.

questions.prompt: The lights were so dim that reading the menu was impossible for us.
questions.promptZh: 燈光非常昏暗，我們根本無法閱讀餐牌。
questions.answer: The lights were so dim that we could not even read the menu.
questions.answerZh: 燈光非常昏暗，我們連餐牌也無法閱讀。
questions.highlight: The lights were so dim that we could not even read the menu.

questions.prompt: The rain was so heavy that the buses were unable to leave the station at all.
questions.promptZh: 雨勢非常大，巴士完全無法駛離車站。
questions.answer: The rain was so heavy that the buses could not even leave the station.
questions.answerZh: 雨勢非常大，巴士甚至無法駛離車站。
questions.highlight: The rain was so heavy that the buses could not even leave the station.

questions.prompt: Our community centre offers language classes. Unexpectedly, it also gives free job advice.
questions.promptZh: 我們的社區中心提供語言課程。出乎意料的是，它也提供免費求職建議。
questions.answer: Our community centre offers language classes and even free job advice.
questions.answerZh: 我們的社區中心提供語言課程，甚至提供免費求職建議。
questions.highlight: Our community centre offers language classes and even free job advice.

questions.prompt: The nurse checked my temperature. To my surprise, she called me the next day too.
questions.promptZh: 護士替我量體溫。令我意外的是，她第二天還致電給我。
questions.answer: The nurse checked my temperature and even called me the next day.
questions.answerZh: 護士替我量體溫，甚至在第二天致電給我。
questions.highlight: The nurse checked my temperature and even called me the next day.

questions.prompt: The school repaired the playground. It went further by adding new safety equipment.
questions.promptZh: 學校修理了遊樂場，並更進一步加裝新的安全設備。
questions.answer: The school repaired the playground and even added new safety equipment.
questions.answerZh: 學校修理了遊樂場，甚至加裝了新的安全設備。
questions.highlight: The school repaired the playground and even added new safety equipment.

questions.prompt: This new website is easier to use. Surprisingly, it also loads faster on old phones.
questions.promptZh: 這個新網站更容易使用。令人意外的是，它在舊手機上的載入速度也更快。
questions.answer: This new website is easier to use and even loads faster on old phones.
questions.answerZh: 這個新網站更容易使用，甚至在舊手機上的載入速度也更快。
questions.highlight: This new website is easier to use and even loads faster on old phones.

questions.prompt: Students who rarely speak in class were the group we least expected to join the discussion, but they did.
questions.promptZh: 我們最沒想到平日很少在課堂上發言的學生會參與討論，但他們真的參與了。
questions.answer: Even students who rarely speak in class joined the discussion.
questions.answerZh: 甚至平日很少在課堂上發言的學生也參與了討論。
questions.highlight: Even students who rarely speak in class joined the discussion.

questions.prompt: The charity reached nearby villages. More impressively, it reached communities across the border.
questions.promptZh: 這間慈善機構接觸到附近村落。更令人佩服的是，它還接觸到邊境另一邊的社區。
questions.answer: The charity reached nearby villages and even communities across the border.
questions.answerZh: 這間慈善機構接觸到附近村落，甚至邊境另一邊的社區。
questions.highlight: The charity reached nearby villages and even communities across the border.

questions.prompt: This plan could reduce costs. It could also improve customer service, which would be an unexpected extra benefit.
questions.promptZh: 這個計劃可以減低成本，也可以改善顧客服務，而後者是意想不到的額外好處。
questions.answer: This plan could reduce costs and even improve customer service.
questions.answerZh: 這個計劃可以減低成本，甚至改善顧客服務。
questions.highlight: This plan could reduce costs and even improve customer service.

questions.prompt: The museum stayed open late. In addition, it offered free guided tours, which surprised visitors.
questions.promptZh: 博物館延長開放時間。此外，它還提供免費導賞團，令訪客感到意外。
questions.answer: The museum stayed open late and even offered free guided tours.
questions.answerZh: 博物館延長開放時間，甚至提供免費導賞團。
questions.highlight: The museum stayed open late and even offered free guided tours.

questions.prompt: This small change made the instructions clearer. More surprisingly, it prevented several mistakes as well.
questions.promptZh: 這項小改動令指示更清楚。更令人意外的是，它也避免了數個錯誤。
questions.answer: This small change made the instructions clearer and even prevented several mistakes.
questions.answerZh: 這項小改動令指示更清楚，甚至避免了數個錯誤。
questions.highlight: This small change made the instructions clearer and even prevented several mistakes.

questions.prompt: Within two days, the emergency team delivered food and repaired the water supply. Most surprisingly, it reopened the clinic too.
questions.promptZh: 在兩天內，緊急應變隊伍運送了食物並修復供水系統。最令人意外的是，隊伍還重開了診所。
questions.answer: The emergency team delivered food, repaired the water supply and even reopened the clinic within two days.
questions.answerZh: 緊急應變隊伍在兩天內運送了食物、修復供水系統，甚至重開了診所。
questions.highlight: The emergency team delivered food, repaired the water supply and even reopened the clinic within two days.
